title: Claudia Marie Muriel Lopez | Education Specialist
gist: An author profile for a World Bank Education Specialist working on TVET and system-strengthening reforms in Cabo Verde and West Africa, with a track record of doubling the Bank's education portfolio in Latin America and the Caribbean.

insights.claim: The World Bank's current education engagement in Cabo Verde and West Africa emphasizes secondary and technical/vocational education (TVET), teacher professional development, curriculum and assessment reform, and governance.
insights.speaker: World Bank Blogs
insights.so_what: Indicates where World Bank education lending and skills-development priorities are concentrated in West Africa.
insights.locator: Claudia Marie Muriel Lopez is an Education Specialist

insights.claim: The World Bank roughly doubled its education portfolio in Latin America and the Caribbean over more than seven years, enabling new skills-development engagements across multiple countries including Haiti.
insights.speaker: World Bank Blogs
insights.so_what: Signals sustained expansion of development-bank education financing in the LAC region, a demand pool for education service and skills providers.
